headline: Has ADP (ADP) Become More Appealing After A 28.5% Share Price Slide?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Automatic Data Processing, at around US$214 per share, is starting to look interesting or if the stock still needs a bigger reset before the value case stacks up. The share price has moved 1.0% over the last week and 5.1% over the last month, while year to date it is down 15.3%. Over the last 12 months it has recorded a 28.5% decline, which can change how the risk and return trade off feels. Recent news coverage has focused on Automatic Data Processing's...
